O,U=-132849-(-132850),g[342722+-342721]while U do o[U],O=o[U]-(389354-389353),O+(-133104+133105)if-287534+287534==o[U]then o[U],K[U]=nil,nil end U=g[O]end end,function(g,O)local n=s(O)local J=function(J,i,X,u,W,K)return U(g,{J;i,X;u;W;K},O,n)end return J end,{}return(q(2949809-(-784486),{}))(n(W))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[O(220983+-182345)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
